name: Cell Passaging (Subculture)

components.name: 3. PBS 洗涤 1–2 次 (去除血清)
4. 加胰酶-EDTA (0.05–0.25%)
components.note: T75: 2–3 mL; 均匀覆盖底面

components.name: 5. 37°C 孵育 2–5 min
components.note: 轻拍瓶壁, 镜下确认脱落

components.name: 6. 加含血清培养基终止消化
7. 吹打混匀成单细胞悬液
8. 按比例接种到新瓶
components.note: 常用传代比: 1:3–1:10; 记录代数

components.name: 9. 补足培养基, 标记, 放入培养箱

notes.en: Over-confluence causes contact inhibition and phenotypic changes. Some cell lines are trypsin-sensitive (e.g., HEK293) — use Accutase or TrypLE instead. Suspension cells: dilute directly. Track passage number — characteristics may change after 20-30 passages. Freeze backup samples at each passage. Use Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free PBS.
notes.zh: 过度汇合会导致接触抑制和表型变化。部分细胞系对胰酶敏感（如 HEK293），用 Accutase 或 TrypLE 代替。悬浮细胞直接稀释传代。记录传代数——超过 20–30 代后细胞特性可能改变。每次传代预留样品冻存。用不含 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 PBS。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th Ed, Ch. 13; ATCC Cell Culture Guide

briefSteps.en: Inspect confluency → remove medium → PBS wash → add trypsin-EDTA → 37°C 2–5 min → quench with medium → resuspend → centrifuge → reseed new flask
briefSteps.zh: 镜检汇合度 → 去旧培养基 → PBS 洗涤 → 加胰酶-EDTA → 37°C 2–5 min → 完全培养基终止 → 吹打重悬 → 离心 → 接种新瓶

detailedSteps.en: Examine cells under microscope to confirm 80–90% confluency and absence of contamination.
detailedSteps.zh: 镜下观察细胞汇合度为 80–90%，并确认无污染。

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate spent culture medium completely from the flask.
detailedSteps.zh: 吸去旧培养基，彻底吸净。

detailedSteps.en: Wash cells with Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺-free 1× PBS (T75: 10 mL; 6-well: 2 mL per well); repeat once. Aspirate PBS completely.
detailedSteps.zh: 用不含 Ca²⁺/Mg²⁺ 的 1× PBS 洗涤细胞（T75：10 mL；6 孔板：2 mL/孔），重复一次，彻底吸净 PBS。

detailedSteps.en: Add pre-warmed 0.05–0.25% trypsin-EDTA to cover the cell monolayer (T75: 2–3 mL) and incubate at 37°C for 2–5 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 加预热的 0.05–0.25% 胰酶-EDTA 均匀覆盖底面（T75：2–3 mL），37°C 孵育 2–5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Gently tap the side of the flask and verify cell detachment under the microscope.
detailedSteps.zh: 轻拍瓶壁，显微镜下确认细胞已脱落。

detailedSteps.en: Add complete culture medium (at least 2× the volume of trypsin) to neutralise the trypsin and pipette up and down to create a single-cell suspension.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入完全培养基（不少于胰酶体积的 2 倍）终止消化，吹打制备单细胞悬液，避免过度吹打产生气泡。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer cell suspension to a conical tube and centrifuge at 300 × g for 3–5 min at room temperature.
detailedSteps.zh: 将细胞悬液转移至离心管，300 × g 室温离心 3–5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate supernatant and resuspend the pellet in an appropriate volume of complete culture medium.
detailedSteps.zh: 吸去上清，用适量完全培养基重悬细胞沉淀。

detailedSteps.en: Count cells if needed and seed into new flasks at the desired split ratio (typically 1:3–1:10 for most cell lines).
detailedSteps.zh: 如需计数，计数后按所需传代比例（通常 1:3–1:10）接种到新培养瓶中。

detailedSteps.en: Top up with complete culture medium, label flask with cell line, passage number, and date, then return to 37°C, 5% CO₂ incubator.
detailedSteps.zh: 补足完全培养基，标记细胞系名称、代次和日期，放回 37°C、5% CO₂ 培养箱。

note.en: After centrifugation, cell pellet can sit on ice for up to 30 min if needed (e.g., for counting). Do not leave too long without medium.
note.zh: 离心后细胞沉淀可冰上放置最长 30 min（例如计数时）。不要在无培养基的情况下放置过久。

usage.en: Subculture adherent mammalian cells by trypsinization and re-plating.
usage.zh: 通过胰酶消化传代贴壁哺乳动物细胞。
